chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-07 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 19-04-2024 Mr. Ghulam Hyder, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G ***** Learned counsel for applicant does not press this Crl. Transfer Application, as according to him, the case transfer of which has been sought by this applicant, has ended in acquittal of the applicant. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is dismissed as having become infructuous. JUDGE Ahmad
